adminNote:
SKIPPED 2026-05-25 - IKEA CDN routing blocks the scraper; config IS correct.

WORKS: listing extraction. First scrape pulled 104/115 jobs from .job-wrapper with title/location/department/jobScope/detailUrl/externalJobId all populated. All 115 jobs render into the DOM at once (client-side pagination toggles display:none).

DOES NOT WORK: detail pages. IKEA's CDN returns the outer 404 SPA shell ('lo nitan limtso et ha-amud', ~134KB) to top-level navigation of /il/he/webapp-local/work-with-us/job/job-details?id=X. The Yii2 backend only routes correctly when the URL is loaded inside the parent page's iframe. All 115 detail navs returned _detailNavStatus=http_error.

DURING ONBOARDING the CDN began returning 404 to the listing URL too (IP rate-limit), reproduced with Playwright+curl with proper UA/Referer/Sec-Fetch headers. First scrape was the lucky window.

CANONICAL LISTING URL (built from clicking Select-All on both filters - currently stored in pageFlow[0].url):
.../job/search-results?Search[store][]=1..9 + Search[professionalField][]=22,29,46-56 + search-button=

CONFIG kept in place (just status flipped): listingSelector=.search-results-wrapper, itemSelector=.job-wrapper, 6 listing fields, pageFlow=[listing, job-details*]. description/applicationInfo omitted (detail pages unreachable).

TO REVIVE:
1. Wait 24-48h or use different scraper egress IP, then PATCH status=ACTIVE. Should produce ~115 jobs/run with listing fields only.
2. For detail enrichment (description, applicationInfo): worker change required - must load detail URLs inside the parent iframe context (Sec-Fetch-Dest=iframe + parent session cookies).
